title: 3.28.0d Patch Notes
all_changes: The Damage Reduction from Soul Eater stacks is now capped at 90% less damage taken on Monsters and Player Minions.
Updated built-in Neversink's console filters to version 8.19.1
Fixed a PlayStation specific client crash
Fixed a bug where players could disconnect if traveling from the Azurite Mine directly to Kingsmarch
Fixed a bug where players could get disconnected when using a portal from a Hideout to travel to the Azurite Mine.
This patch has been deployed without restarting the servers. You will need to update your client to receive the client changes in this patch.

skill_nerfs.raw: The Damage Reduction from Soul Eater stacks is now capped at 90% less damage taken on Monsters and Player Minions.
